page_metadata.biotools__summary: Aggregation Nucleation Prediction in Peptides and Proteins (ANuPP) is a ensemble-classifier developed and trained to identify amyloid-fibril forming peptides and regions in protein sequences.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Aggregation Nucleation Prediction in Peptides and Proteins (ANuPP) is a ensemble-classifier developed and trained to identify amyloid-fibril forming peptides and regions in protein sequences.
